_doc: BO NHO DAILY TASK - cac viec lam HANG NGAY tren HOME. Bot doc file nay luc chay 'daily' de KHONG QUEN. Khong hardcode toa do - moi task la phuong phap NHAN DIEN + GIAI (semantic). Cap nhat khi hoc them.

routine.name: Nhan qua tu cac DOLL CAM QUA trong san HOME
routine.how: perception.detect_courtyard_dolls() tim con doll than trang cam vat pham (hop go 'Lot'=diem danh, the do=task/reward). Click tung doll -> doc man hien ra -> nhan thuong neu co.

discovered.reward: AR Amulet, Demon Parade Pass, AP50, Orochi Scale50, Bones, Fresh Fish...

routine.skip: doll mo menu Interact/Wish/Decors (decor), Characters (nhan vat nguoi choi), Mentorship Notice (apprentice) -> KHONG phai qua, bo qua.
routine.click_type: politeclick (tin cay hon fgclick cho modal nhan thuong; fgclick doi khi tra OK nhung popup khong dong)

routine.name: Nhan het thu trong Mailbox
routine.how: Click icon mail goc tren phai (~1049,53 sendclick, vi tri co the doi -> nen detect badge do o top-right). Trong Mailbox co nut 'Claim All' (doll ~75,575). Bam -> dialog OK/Cancel hien reward -> bam OK.

discovered.note: Mailbox co tab System/Special Mail, Read All, Delete Read

routine.click_type: Claim All = sendclick OK; dialog OK xac nhan = fgclick/politeclick (sendclick+tap_text bi bo qua)
routine.task_fn: tasks/run.py claim_home --live (quet badge do, gom ca mail)

routine.name: Quet badge do tren HOME va claim het
routine.how: perception.detect_red_badges(ui_only=True) -> badge do = dau hieu co the claim (mail, task xong, qua chua nhan). Tap gan badge -> popup claim -> bam Claim/Receive/OK.

navigation.reach_home: automation/state_solver.py StateSolver.solve(['Explore','Summon']) - chu yeu bang 'back'. Hoac back_home() trong task biet CLAIM popup thay vi back mu.
navigation.idle_screensaver: neu man courtyard idle (nhan vat nghi duoi sakura) -> tap center (576,340) de wake, roi back qua cac popup event.

click_methods.sendclick: SendMessage - dieu huong thuong (NeoX an SendMessage, BO QUA PostMessage)
click_methods.politeclick: real mouse + tra chuot ve cho user - TIN CAY NHAT cho modal nhan thuong
click_methods.fgclick: real mouse foreground - cho modal cung, nhung doi khi khong dong duoc popup
click_methods.pmclick: PostMessage - NeoX hay bo qua, chi de test

next: Doll Mentorship (apprentice request) chua xu ly dung - can flow rieng.
Khi nhieu letter 'Claim Gifts' xep hang (event returnee) -> claim lap nhieu lop.
Ghep tat ca thanh 1 lenh 'dn HOME moi ngay': mail + doll + daily task + free summon + friend love.
